alertDesc: This dashboard displays interactive marker clustering, drawing tools via Geoman, and custom density heatmaps. Use the controls on the left to toggle layers.
controlsDesc: Toggle the Leaflet extensions to see clustering, drawing, and heat overlays.
description: A showcase of Leaflet and its most useful extensions integrated with React and TypeScript.
invalidTileUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP/HTTPS tile URL.
noShapes: No custom shapes drawn. Use the map tools on the top left of the map to draw.
